lastReleaseMessage: chore: gitignore logs/ (watchdog heartbeat + relaunch log are operational state)

barRaise.topFinding: v1.0.0 cut and tagged (2026-06-23). All eight action items from the 2026-06-23 bar-raise are resolved: the watchdog now runs a GET / liveness probe with a rotating relaunch log and a heartbeat surfaced on this dashboard; the UI carries a version pill; saveProjects() writes atomically; D-009/M6 wording is reconciled to shipped; the full tunnel id and config.yml are captured in ARCHITECTURE.md; and the two stale .bak scripts are removed. The running build matches the tag and is reproducible from version control. No open actions.
